articles.headline: Cyber Threats Grow in Agriculture as Ransomware Targets Supply Chain
articles.summary: Ransomware attacks are increasingly targeting the food and agriculture supply chain as data usage in the sector expands. Businesses in agriculture face heightened cybersecurity risks that could disrupt operations, compromise sensitive data, and impact global food supply chains. Companies must prioritize proactive defenses to mitigate financial and operational losses.

articles.headline: 5 Business Technology Trends Leaders Can't Ignore in 2026
articles.summary: Key trends include agentic AI for process redesign, physical AI via robotics-as-a-service, and AI-driven cybersecurity, enabling SMEs to boost efficiency without heavy investments. These shifts promise controlled growth, reduced labor costs, and automation of physical tasks in retail, manufacturing, and construction. Leaders delaying adoption risk falling behind in productivity and competitiveness.

articles.headline: Digital Transformation Is A Business Imperative In 2026
articles.summary: Digital transformation has become the baseline for modern businesses, with delays posing significant risks to competitiveness and sustainability. Organizations must adapt to AI, cloud, and automation tools to manage costs, enhance operations, and meet market expectations. SMEs and large firms ignoring this face higher operational risks and lost opportunities.
